args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
build_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness early-serve)
printf '%s' "$build_out" | grep -q 'readiness=EarlyServe'
grep -q '"requested_readiness":"early_serve"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"achieved_readiness":"early_serve"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"status":"contradicted"' "$bundle_dir/materialization_report.json"
if grep -q '"warmup_obligations":\[' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"; then
  grep -q '"warmup_obligations":\[\]' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
fi
printf 'early-serve\n'

set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)

if grep -q '"warmup_obligations":\[' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"; then
  grep -q '"warmup_obligations":\[\]' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
fi
printf 'early-serve\n'
